title: thymus commutatus
intro: Thymus commutatus, also known as creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading herb that belongs to the mint family and is native to the Mediterranean region. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oil, which contains thymol, a compound with antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Thymus commutatus include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. This herb can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
